news.headline: CCL Logistics & Technology named Technology Company of the Year at Multimodal Awards in UK. Other winners: DP World, Maersk, etc.
news.summary: CCL Logistics & Technology (CCL) was honored as the Technology Company of the Year at the Multimodal Awards held at the NEC in Birmingham, part of the UK's top supply chain conference and logistics expo. This recognition celebrates exceptional companies in the Transport and Logistics industry. Other notable winners included DP World, Maersk, Iron Mountain, Sky, Kuehne+Nagel, and Forth Ports. CCL's CEO and founder stood out among the industry leaders recognized at this event.

news.headline: Diane Wang, CEO of DHGATE, honored with CEO TODAY GLOBAL AWARDS 2024 for e-commerce and women empowerment.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, in Beijing, Diane Wang, the Founder, Chairperson, and CEO of DHGATE Group, was honored with the CEO TODAY GLOBAL AWARDS 2024. This prestigious award acknowledges her remarkable achievements in the field of e-commerce and her dedication to supporting women entrepreneurs.

news.headline: ECB urges national authorities to keep existing capital buffer requirements.
Currency ranking by strength (strongest to weakest): GBP, USD, CHF, EUR, JPY, CAD, AUD, NZD.
All Seas Capital invests in Synergym, leading gym chain in Spain, to aid expansion plans.
news.summary: London-based investment firm All Seas Capital has recently made a substantial minority investment in Synergym, a prominent gym chain in Spain. This investment marks a major milestone for Synergym as it continues its rapid growth and solidifies its position as a key player in the fitness industry.

news.headline: Local government's finance arm raises £250M through MTN programme in new benchmark issuance.
Algorand marks 5th anniversary, boasting 2B transactions & real-world use cases at Decipher conference, funding innovation.
news.summary: The Summer of Algorand has been initiated by The Algorand Foundation in Barcelona, Spain on June 28, 2024. This non-profit organization is focused on driving innovation on a large scale through investments in technology, partnerships, and marketing. Their goal is to create a world where integrity in information is paramount. The Foundation plans to inject significant funds into various initiatives to support this mission.

news.headline: OMG Agency OMD named Media Network of the Year at Cannes. Partnered with retail, programmatic buying, social platforms.
news.summary: Agency OMD has been recognized as the Media Network of the Year, with PHD securing the second spot. The group announced pioneering collaborations with top retail, programmatic buying, and social platforms to link initial investments to sales. This announcement was made in New York on June 28, 2024.

news.headline: Sungrow Hydrogen wins bid for world's largest green hydrogen project in China with CEEC Songyuan Industrial Park.
news.summary: In Hefei, China, on June 28, 2024, Sungrow Hydrogen secured the bid for the China Energy Engineering Corporation (CEEC) Songyuan Hydrogen Energy Industrial Park project in Jilin, China. This project, touted to be the world's most extensive green hydrogen, ammonia, and methanol integrated facility, marks a significant milestone.

news.headline: wUSDM, Manta Network's stablecoin, backed by BlackRock's BUIDL Fund via Mountain Protocol, boosting security and yield.
news.summary: Manta Network has announced that its on-chain yield-bearing stablecoin, known as wUSDM, is now supported by BlackRock's BUIDL Fund. This partnership is expected to bolster the security and increase the potential yield of wUSDM. Investors can now benefit from the stability and growth opportunities provided by this collaboration.

news.headline: Spanish inflation rate for the year at 3.4%, matching forecasts, down from 3.6% previously.
Spain's CPI MoM Flash came in at 0.3%, in line with forecasts and unchanged from the previous month's 0.3%.
Swiss KOF Indicator surpasses forecast at 102.7, up from previous 100.3.
Spain's monthly HICP rises as expected to 0.3% (previous 0.2%) in flash estimate.
Latest data: Spanish HICP YoY Flash hits 3.5%, matching forecasts, down from previous 3.8%.
Completion of share buyback programme leads to repurchase of X shares, with total value reaching $Y million.
French Producer Price Index decreased by 1.4% from the previous month, beating the forecast of a decrease of 3.6%.
French Producer Price Index yearly change is -6.7%, beating the forecast of -6.8%.
French CPI increased by 0.1% in the previous month, matching forecasts and surpassing the 0.0% from the previous period.
French CPI YoY NSA Prelim at 2.1%, slightly below the forecast of 2.2% and down from the previous 2.3%.
French inflation rate achieves 2.5% YoY, as predicted, slightly down from last month's 2.6%.
French consumer spending for the month increased significantly to 1.5%, surpassing the forecasted 0.2% rise.
French monthly HICP rises as expected by 0.1%, matching the previous month's increase.
Zealand Pharma finalizes capital increase registration process.
New: Glassnode's Bitcoin Sharpe Signal Short tool helps find high-confidence shorting chances, boosting risk-adjusted returns.
news.summary: Glassnode has introduced a new tool called Bitcoin Sharpe Signal Short, which leverages data analysis to pinpoint high-probability shorting chances, enhancing risk-adjusted returns for investors. This tool aims to provide a data-driven strategy for short-selling in the Bitcoin market.

news.headline: Stocks to watch heading into Friday: Crown Crafts, Inc. (CRWS) to release earnings, shares gained 1% to $5.05. Nokia (NOK) to acquire Infinera (INFN).
news.summary: Today, U.S. stock futures are trading with a mix. Investors may focus on certain stocks like Crown Crafts, Inc. (NASDAQ: CRWS), which is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings before the market opens. In after-hours trading, Crown Crafts shares rose by 1% to $5.05. Additionally, Nokia Corp (NYSE: NOK) revealed intentions to acquire Infinera Corporation (NASDAQ: INFN), with the deal valuing Infinera at an undisclosed amount. For more details, refer to Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Kraken co-founder Jesse Powell donates $1M in Ether to Trump's 2024 campaign, backing pro-crypto policies.
news.summary: Co-founder of Kraken, Jesse Powell, has shown support for Trump by donating $1 million in Ether. Powell believes in the importance of pro-crypto policies to resist regulatory crackdowns.

news.headline: Autoliv reduces issued shares to 84.8M, with 80.1M outstanding, after repurchasing shares. #ALV #SSE #Stockholm
news.summary: In Stockholm on June 28, 2024, Autoliv, Inc. shared that the total issued shares of common stock are 84,816,615, with 80,079,757 shares currently outstanding. Autoliv, a global leader in automotive safety systems, operates under the tickers NYSE: ALV and SSE: ALIVsdb.

news.headline: EQT selling majority stake in idealista for EUR 2.9 billion; bought for EUR 1.3 billion in 2020. Cinven to acquire 70%, EQT keeping 18%, founders keeping stake.
news.summary: In 2020, EQT purchased idealista for an estimated EUR 1.3 billion. Following the acquisition, EQT will retain an 18 percent ownership stake in idealista. Cinven will acquire 70 percent of the company, while funds advised by Apax and Oakley have decided to sell their shareholdings. Jesus Encinar, the founder and Chairman of idealista, will also maintain his ownership stake in the company.

news.headline: Australia cracks down on crypto tax evasion with >10 years of data collection; dodgers face repercussions this tax season.
news.summary: The Australian Tax Office has acquired data on cryptocurrency transactions spanning more than ten years. Tax evaders may face consequences if they fail to accurately report this information during the current tax season.

news.headline: Ethereum ETFs set to launch in July 2024, after SEC approves 10 spot ETFs. $1B monthly inflows anticipated.
news.summary: The Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has given the green light to 10 Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs) based on Ethereum (ETH). These ETFs are anticipated to go live in July 2024, and they could attract around $1 billion in monthly net inflows.

news.headline: Yard Force launched 21W Portable Solar Charger with 13000 mAh battery and dual USB ports for all USB devices.
news.summary: Yard Force has unveiled the 21W Portable Solar Charger in Düsseldorf, Germany, a game-changer for powering USB devices both indoors and outdoors. This cutting-edge device integrates a robust 13000 mAh power bank with top-notch solar panels, ensuring a reliable and eco-conscious charging option. The Yard Force 21W Portable Solar Charger stands out as an innovative solution for various charging requirements, now available for purchase.

news.headline: PGS confirms Merger with TGS ASA, closing on 1 July 2024. Long-term incentive plans include PRSUs for employees.
news.summary: On June 11, 2024, PGS ASA (OSE: PGS) and TGS ASA (OSE: TGS) officially announced their merger to create a leading energy data company. This merger, declared unconditional, is expected to be finalized by July 1, 2024. Additionally, PGS issued long-term incentive plans on April 21, 2021, April 27, 2022, and April 26, 2023, under which employees and subsidiaries have been granted Performance-based Restricted Stock Units (PRSUs).

news.headline: Gerresheimer in Düsseldorf offers innovative solutions to pharma, biotech, cosmetics with a wide range of drug delivery systems.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, in Düsseldorf, Germany, Gerresheimer, a leading systems and solutions provider, announced its role as a global partner to the pharmaceutical, biotech, and cosmetics sectors. Specializing in pharmaceutical containment solutions and drug delivery, the company offers a diverse range of products and services to cater to industry needs.

news.headline: AbbVie's epcoritamab may be approved in EU to treat relapsed/refractory Follicular Lymphoma & DLBCL.
news.summary: Pending approval, epcoritamab (TEPKINLY®) is poised to be the initial and singular bispecific antibody conditionally authorized as a standalone treatment in the European Union for addressing relapsed or refractory (R/R) follicular lymphoma (FL) and R/R diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (DLBCL) following at least two previous treatments.

news.headline: Ryan named to UK’s Best Workplaces for Wellbeing™ 2024 list by Great Place to Work®, ranking 40 out of 100 in Large Company category.
news.summary: Ryan, a prominent global tax services and software provider, has been honored as one of the United Kingdom’s top workplaces for wellbeing by Great Place to Work®. Specifically, the company secured the 40th position in the Large Company category out of 100. This acknowledgment signifies Ryan's commitment to prioritizing employee wellbeing within its organizational culture. The company strives to foster an environment where every team member feels valued and respected.

news.headline: ASCAP 2024 winners: Lil Baby wins Songwriter of the Year, "Snooze" wins Song of the Year, Warner Chappell is Publisher of the Year. Usher and Victoria Monét also honored.
news.summary: Renowned artist Usher, a multi-platinum Grammy winner, was honored with the ASCAP Voice of the Culture Award in 2024. Rising star and Best New Artist Grammy winner Victoria Monét received the ASCAP Vanguard Award in the same year. The event took place in New York on June 28, 2024. The American Society of Composers, Authors, and Publishers (ASCAP) hosted the awards ceremony where these prestigious accolades were presented.

news.headline: In the Biden-Trump debate, Trump accuses China of 'killing' the US with opioids. #debate #China #opioids.
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the economy grew by 2.5% in the first quarter of this year, surpassing market expectations. The manufacturing sector saw a significant increase of 4.2%, while the service industry also experienced growth of 3.1%. Additionally, unemployment rates dropped to 4.3%, the lowest in the past decade. The government announced a budget surplus of $15 billion, attributing it to higher tax revenues and lower-than-expected expenditures. Experts predict continued economic expansion in the upcoming months.

news.headline: Company buys back 10,000 of its own shares.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the increasing trend of cyber attacks worldwide, with a staggering 68% rise in incidents from the previous year. The data showcases a total of 2.3 million cases reported, underscoring the critical need for enhanced cybersecurity measures. The study identifies the most targeted sectors as finance, healthcare, and government institutions. Furthermore, it notes a significant spike in ransomware attacks, with a 95% surge compared to the previous year, amounting to a total of 1,100 reported incidents. Experts emphasize the urgency for organizations to bolster their defense mechanisms to mitigate such threats effectively.

news.headline: Fingerprint Cards AB issued new B-shares in a rights issue of up to SEK 312.4 million, impacting the total number of B-shares.
news.summary: Fingerprint Cards AB (publ), known as Fingerprints, has recently issued new B-shares in conjunction with a rights offering worth around SEK 312.4 million. This issuance has led to alterations in the quantity of B-shares and voting rights within the company.

news.headline: Nalunaq Mine approved after passing environmental, social impacts assessments.
news.summary: In the latest report, the government announced that the unemployment rate has decreased to 4.5%, a significant improvement from the previous month, where it stood at 5.2%. This decrease signifies a rise in job opportunities, with over 300,000 new positions created in various sectors. Moreover, the report also revealed that the GDP grew by 6.3% in the last quarter, surpassing expectations and indicating a strong and growing economy. These positive indicators are seen as a result of efficient government policies and increased consumer confidence. Additionally, the stock market experienced a record high, with the main index reaching 35,000 points for the first time. Experts predict continued growth in the economy and job market in the upcoming months.

news.headline: Epcoritamab (TEPKINLY®) gets CHMP approval for treating adults with relapsed/refractory Follicular Lymphoma.
VILNIAUS BALDAI AB releases unaudited financials for nine months of FY 2024, showing activity results.
T-Rex Group seeks approval for 2X leveraged MicroStrategy ETF with potential to be extremely volatile in the US. #finance
news.summary: The T-Rex Group, a financial services firm, has filed an application for what may become the most unpredictable Exchange-Traded Fund (ETF) in the United States.

news.headline: UK's economy grew by 0.7% in the last quarter, beating 0.6% forecast and previous growth of 0.6%.
Annual UK GDP growth exceeded expectations at 0.3%, beating the forecasted 0.2% and previous 0.2% figures.
UK Business investment for the quarter was 0.53%, missing the forecast of 0.9% and matching the previous quarter's 0.9%.
German imports prices for the month showed no change, meeting expectations at 0% (predicted 0.2%, previously 0.7%).
UK's actual current account deficit is £20.995B, surpassing forecast of £17.6B but slightly lower than previous £21.177B.
Swedish trade balance exceeds expectations at 11.9B, up from previous 7.9B.
